zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Irons於1641年4月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓時，她的父親Matthew Irons26歲，母親Hannah Anne Browne36歲。她於1659年3月6日與Richard Randall Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1704年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克薩可享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Irons于1641年4月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓时，她的父亲Matthew Irons26岁，母亲Hannah Anne Browne36岁。她于1659年3月6日与Richard Randall Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1704年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克薩可享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Irons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Iron , with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Hirons .
Scottish (Angus): habitational name from an unidentified place called Irnys in 1398–9.

variants.name: Iron
meanings: Native American: translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota and Dakota Sioux maza, meaning ‘metal’. Among the Sioux, many of their traditional personal names with this element were adopted as surnames (translated into English), e.g. Iron Cloud (see Ironcloud ) and Iron Hawk (see Ironhawk ).
English: nickname perhaps from Middle English iron, the name of a bird, possibly a variant of Middle English ern ‘eagle’ (Old English earn) or of Middle English heroun ‘heron’ (Old French heirun).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Irons was born on 15 April 1641, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Matthew Irons, was 26 and her mother, Hannah Anne Browne, was 36. She married Richard Randall Sr. on 6 March 1659, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 16 April 1704, in Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

Elle a épousé Richard Randall Sr. le 6 mars 1659, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ironsが1641年4月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンで生まれた時，父Matthew Ironsは26歳，母Hannah Anne Browneは36歳であった。1659年3月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでRichard Randall Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1704年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークサコで63歳で死去した。

ko.Cape Porpoise, Kennebunkport, York, Mass: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 캡 포르포이스
ko.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Irons(이)가 1641년 4월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew Irons(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Anne Browne(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1659년 3월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Richard Randall Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1704년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 사코에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Irons nasceu em 15 de abril de 1641, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Matthew Irons, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Anne Browne, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Randall Sr. em 6 de março de 1659, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de abril de 1704, em Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Irons родилась 15 апреля 1641 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Matthew Irons было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Anne Browne, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Randall Sr. 6 марта 1659 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 16 апреля 1704 г. в местности сако, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Irons nació el 15 de abril de 1641, en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Matthew Irons, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Hannah Anne Browne, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Richard Randall Sr. el 6 de marzo de 1659, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 16 de abril de 1704, en Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
